title: View All Campaigns (Global)
postconditions: User is viewing a global list of all campaigns across the system
trigger: User navigates to the starting page

main_scenario.action: User navigates to the root URL or Global Campaigns link
System retrieves a complete list of all public/active campaigns in the system
System displays the campaigns, including the GM owner's username for context

exceptions.action: System displays an empty state message

acceptance_criteria: All campaigns are displayed, regardless of owner.
Unauthenticated users can view this list.
The list acts as the starting page of the application.
